post.summary: Get repository annotations for a specific revision

parameters.name: includeAttributeValues
parameters.description: Whether to include attribute values associated with this branch

post.summary: Retrieves an access token for user credentials

patch.summary:
Patches a single repository's permissions.
Only the SEIDs specified in the request will get affected. The rest
of the already existing permissions on the repository will remain unchanged.

bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"
